CO4.description: The procedure code is inconsistent with the modifier used or a required modifier is missing
CO4.recommended_action: Review procedure code and modifiers for accuracy, then resubmit

CO16.description: Claim/service lacks information or has submission/billing error(s)
CO16.recommended_action: Review claim for missing or incorrect information and resubmit

CO45.description: Charge exceeds fee schedule/maximum allowable or contracted/legislated fee arrangement

CO97.description: The benefit for this service is included in the payment/allowance for another service/procedure that has already been adjudicated
CO97.recommended_action: Bundled service — review if unbundling is appropriate

CO151.description: Payment adjusted because the payer deems the information submitted does not support this many/frequency of services
CO151.recommended_action: Review service frequency and submit supporting documentation

CO253.description: Sequestration — Loss is the responsibility of the provider

PR96.recommended_action: Contact payer for clarification on patient-related denial

OA23.description: Impact of prior payer(s) adjudication including payments and/or adjustments
OA23.recommended_action: Coordination of benefits adjustment — review secondary payer

N790.recommended_action: Obtain valid prior authorization and resubmit

N30.recommended_action: Verify patient eligibility and coverage, then resubmit or appeal

MA130.description: Your claim contains incomplete and/or invalid information
MA130.recommended_action: Review claim for completeness and resubmit with corrected information
